---
title: "Dataset Options"
---

Students can choose one of two ready-to-use environmental datasets.

## Option A: Air + water + rainfall trends

- File: `data/environment_nz.csv`
- Variables: month, PM2.5, rainfall, average temperature, river nitrate
- Good inquiry questions:
  - Which months have the highest rainfall?
  - Does river nitrate change with seasonal rainfall?
  - Are PM2.5 values stable across the year?

## Option B: Waste + recycling trends

- File: `data/waste_recycling_nz.csv`
- Variables: month, recycling tonnes, landfill tonnes, contamination %, household waste kg
- Good inquiry questions:
  - Is landfill tonnage reducing over time?
  - How does contamination affect recycling quality?
  - Which months have highest household waste?

## Quick start R code

```{r}
# Choose one dataset path
# data_path <- "data/environment_nz.csv"
data_path <- "data/waste_recycling_nz.csv"

df <- read.csv(data_path)
head(df)
```

## Teaching note

Start all students with a common dataset for the first chart, then allow topic differentiation after Week 6.
